resources.string: NOTE: This option enables syncing with YouTube Music and CANNOT be changed later
Download all songs for offline playback
Remove all downloaded songs from this playlist
Sync this playlist with YouTube Music
Replace the album artwork with the app logo in the player
Force a square aspect ratio by cropping video thumbnails
When enabled, adds 5 extra seconds incrementally with each seek
The display density change will take effect after restarting the app. Restart now?
Swipe left to add the song to the queue, or right to play it next
Swipe to remove the song from the playlist
Hide the status bar when lyrics fullscreen mode is active
Shows a progress bar during long instrumental gaps
Align lyrics based on the agent role (e.g. background vocals)
Adds a glowing animation and bounce effect to the active lyric line
Pulls lyrics from KuGou, a popular Chinese music platform
NOTE: YouTube Music lyrics will be shown automatically when no other source is available. They are usually not synchronized
Syllable-synced lyrics for any song, perfect for karaoke
High-quality synchronized lyrics from Paxsenix API
Choose which lyrics providers are enabled
Automatically cache songs for faster future playback
When shuffling, play all songs from the current playlist or album before moving to similar content
When adding a track that\'s already in the queue, it will be moved from its previous position rather than added again
Fast-forward through silent parts of songs
Jump ahead during silent moments instead of speeding up playback
Tap again to copy or edit

This is an ADVANCED login method. Instead of using the web portal, you can enter or update your login token directly. This can be useful for signing in across multiple devices quickly. Tokens in an unrecognized format will be rejected
NOTE: Your account must be linked to a phone number and verified on YouTube Music to change the playlist cover
After selecting an image, please wait a moment for the new cover to appear in your playlist
Based on the last song you listened to
Drag to reorder providers by preference. Higher position means higher priority
Enable the new experimental lyrics component with enhanced animations and performance
The new lyrics component is currently in development and may contain bugs. Are you sure you want to enable it?
Show the song title prominently instead of the artist name
Automatically adds more similar songs when the end of the queue is reached
Keep shuffle enabled when starting new songs or playlists
Remember shuffle and repeat settings when the app is restarted
NOTE: Adding local songs to synced or remote playlists is not supported. Any other combination is valid
Automatically download songs when you like them
Are you sure you want to clear all cached songs?
Are you sure you want to clear all cached images?
Are you sure you want to clear all downloads?
Sleep timer default set to %d minutes
Automatically starts the sleep timer at a set time using the default duration
Set a recurring day and time for the sleep timer to activate automatically
Stop at the end of current song
Waits for the currently playing song to finish before stopping
Gradually fades out the volume in the final minute
Choose which playlist the alarm will play
No alarms yet. Add one to start scheduled playback
Another alarm already exists at this time. If both trigger simultaneously, only one may play
Play a random song from the playlist
Grants permission for precise alarm timing, improving reliability when the app is in the background
Disable battery optimization for more reliable alarm behavior in the background
Disable auto-load in repeat all mode
Don\'t automatically load more songs or similar content when repeat all is enabled
Pause music when media is muted
Keep screen on when player is expanded
Fades out the current song as the next one fades in
Skip crossfade for albums designed to play without gaps
Crossfade is a new feature and may have bugs. If you experience any issues, please report them.\n\nNOTE: This feature disables audio offload due to technical limitations
Cyrillic script will be detected line-by-line rather than across the entire song

This is a hit-or-miss experimental feature.

By default, the language is detected from the entire song. With this option on, it will be detected line-by-line instead. This allows multi-language songs to work, BUT the detected language may not always be correct. For example, a Ukrainian line without any Ukrainian-specific characters might be romanized as Russian.

If you are not experiencing any issues, it is recommended to keep this option off
Uses the hardware audio offload path for playback. Disabling this may increase battery usage, but can help if you experience issues with playback or audio post-processing
Link pitch to playback speed, resulting in tape-style speedup and slowdown effects
Cast audio to Chromecast and other Cast-enabled devices
Love or unlove songs in Last.fm when you like or unlike them in Metrolist
Start a radio based on this item
Add to the end of the queue
Share a link to this item
Adjust the song\'s tempo and pitch
Unavailable when the new mini-player design is disabled
The limit you\'ve chosen (%1$s) is smaller than what the app is currently using. Continuing may cause some cached %2$s to be removed. Proceed anyway?
You\'ve listened to this album for %d minutes!
Your top artists of the year
Your top songs of the year
Your top artist of the year is
You\'ve listened to them for %d minutes!
it\'s time to see what you\'ve been listening to all this year…
Time to see what you loved all this year…
Special thanks to MO Agamy for creating Metrolist
Are you sure you want to delete %1$s? This action cannot be undone
Search for your headphone or earphone model
Music player widget with playback controls
Circular music widget with play and like controls
Identify songs playing around you directly from your home screen
Something went wrong. Please try again
Shows a notification while identifying a song from the widget
Recording audio to identify the song…
Create a room and share the code with your friends
Automatically approve join requests without reviewing them manually
Automatically approve and queue song suggestions from guests
Guests will match the host\'s volume level
Show Listen Together in the top app bar instead of the navigation bar
Listen to music with your friends in real time. Create a room to host, or join an existing room with a code
NOTE: When you are connected but not in a room, Listen Together disconnects after 30 minutes in the background to save battery
Listen Together is not set up. Please configure the server URL in: Listen Together > Settings > Server URL
The username cannot be changed while in a room
Remove this person from the session
Block this person\'s join requests and hide their suggestions
Make this person the host of the room
Translates the meaning into the target language
Converts pronunciation into the target script
Visit https://openrouter.ai for free and paid models
Visit https://deepl.com/pro-api for free and paid keys
Custom instructions sent to the AI model. Leave empty to use the default prompt
Use {lineCount} as a placeholder for the number of lines to translate
An unexpected error occurred. Please share the crash report to help us fix the issue
Forces the display to run at its highest supported refresh rate (e.g. 120Hz)
Are you sure you want to clear all recognition history?
Shows a notification while identifying a song from quick settings

This feature uses the KizzyRPC library to connect to Discord\'s Gateway and update your Rich Presence status. While no account suspensions from similar usage have been reported, this method is not officially supported by Discord and may be considered a Terms of Service violation. Your token is handled locally and never sent to third-party servers. Proceed at your own discretion!
Sign in with Discord to share what you\'re listening to
Custom name for the activity. Leave empty to use the default
Show additional Rich Presence customization options
Randomly reorder home screen sections using weighted priorities
Do you want to keep your playlists and library data? Downloaded songs will always be kept
Free, open-source software. You may use, study, share, and improve it
Want to play their favorite song?
Add to your Episodes for later playlist
This will restore your app data from the selected backup
You will need to log in again after restoring. The following account will be signed out:
Unsupported format. Supported formats: MP3, M4A, WMA, FLAC, OGG
Are you sure you want to delete this uploaded song? This action cannot be undone
Are you sure you want to delete %1$d uploaded songs? This action cannot be undone
Tap a section to enable or disable it.\nLong-press the drag handle to reorder. The first section will be shown by default
Show YouTube Music recommended playlists in the playlists section while browsing with Android Auto
Choose the playlist where songs are saved when using the quick-add button in Android Auto
No playlist selected. Choose one in Android Auto settings
WARNING: This action cannot be undone once completed. Create a backup before proceeding. Only songs with at least one registered play are eligible
Keep typing to narrow results (%d more)
Automatically play the next song when the current one ends
